title: StrikeTempInput
description: Normalized input for computing the strike water temperature needed to hit a target mash temperature when grain is added. Decoupled from BeerJSON: an adapter extracts these fields from a Recipe.

mash_target_c.description: Desired mash rest temperature once grain has equilibrated, in °C.

grain_temp_c.description: Grain temperature at the moment of mash-in, in °C. Use ambient room temp if grain has been stored indoors.

thickness_l_per_kg.description: Mash thickness — liters of water per kg of grain. Typical: 1.5-3.5 L/kg.

grain_specific_heat_ratio.description: Ratio of grain's specific heat to water's specific heat. Standard homebrew approximation: 0.41 (Palmer, 'How to Brew').
